description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Cruise autonomous vehicle ("Cruise AV"), operating in autonomous mode, was at a complete stop in response to a red light on 
southbound 4th Avenue at the intersection with Geary Boulevard. Another vehicle approaching from the rear made contact with the Cruise 
AV's rear bumper, damaging the rear bumper. The driver of the other vehicle left the scene without exchanging information. There were no 
injuries and police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
